description: preloaded dru module for quote retrieval, storage, random recall, and search.
activation_scope: apply quote semantics only when module quote is explicitly invoked or activated
constraints: lookup commands store returned quotes in dru_quote
random and search operate on stored quote rows only
no seeded historical or personal data in module bootstrap

command_rows.command_semantic: activate quote retrieval, storage, random recall, and search rules within dru.
store provided quote as a quote row
output a relevant quote from {{ argument }} and save it as a row
output a quote about {{ argument }} and save it as a row
insert and display a quote from {{ argument_1 }} about {{ argument_2 }}
output a random stored quote from dru_quote
